type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Annual increase in the usage of Hydrochloric Acid 30% for 2022 is above the MPO reporting threshold of 10 tonnes.
Hydrochloric Acid 30% is used as a felt cleaning agent in the paper making process. A 1% solution of Hydrochloric Acid is prepared in batches several times per day during mill operations. this solution is then applied to the felts and is immediately removed using vacuum pumps and discharged to the mill drains where the pH of the solution is neutralized to approximately 7. There are no releases of HCL to any media.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment:
A new boiler was installed and operated in 2022. The Emission factor used to calculate PM10 releases to air are different for this new boiler.
The total PM10 releases to air includes the calculated Clay-Mixer Baghouse losses based on total pigments added to the Clay-Mixer in 2022.
